title: Codereview pass 1: Epoch wrap comparison may fail at u8 boundary
description: In ReplayProtector::check_and_update, the epoch comparison 'epoch < *min' will incorrectly reject epoch=0 when min_epoch=255, causing valid frames to be dropped after epoch wrap. While epoch wrap takes ~7.5 years at max traffic (spec), this edge case should be documented or handled with wrapping-aware comparison. Location: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs:238-241
close_reason: Epoch wrap edge case documented - 7.5 years at max traffic, added to future considerations
